block_01: Many traders love strategies with just one indicator, since they are so simple to set up and so convenient to follow. The moving average bounce is exactly like that: to use it, you only need one tool and some time to practice reading its signals.
block_02: This approach works on short (1-5 minutes) timeframes across all instruments. The MA bounce looks for strong trends which are likely to bounce back to the average price of the asset. After the bounce, the trend continues moving in the original direction and this strategy helps you not to miss an opportunity of entry.
block_03: To understand how to use this approach better, check the full article on the IQ Option blog.
block_09: Heiken Ashi. Candlestick Chart on Steroids
